notes: Full-pipeline baseline registration scope. Use when freezing or comparing a complete maintained Stage2 through Stage5 baseline lineage; all maintained stage families may lawfully differ because the baseline object itself is the comparison target.

Selector-only scope freeze. Evidence-block outputs may change, but candidate segmentation, prompt, raw-response, semantic-object, compatibility-projection, Stage3, and Stage5 surfaces should remain frozen.
Prompt-only scope freeze. Prompt artifacts may change, but evidence selection should normally remain frozen and downstream families must not drift silently.
Semantic-parsing-only scope freeze. Parsed semantic objects may change, but raw responses should normally remain frozen and no compatibility, Stage3, or Stage5 drift should be accepted silently.

Stage3-only scope freeze. Completed Stage2 inputs should remain frozen. Stage5 drift is allowed only as a downstream consequence of changed Stage3 relation artifacts, and feature-activation drift still requires review.
Stage5-filtering-only scope freeze. Stage2 and Stage3 surfaces should remain frozen. Only benchmark-final outputs, compare surfaces, and warning-tier feature activation are allowed to differ.
